{{Quote|Fassssst and 'arrrrrd.|A Snutib, to Jaina Solo|<ref name="DN3">''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''</ref>}}
The '''Snutib''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of mantid-like hunters that allied with the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] during the [[Swarm War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}
